bar_group_intro.speaker: Player
bar_group_intro.text: Three people are talking in hushed voices. They don't seem to realize that we're here.

bar_group_line1.speaker: Florence
bar_group_line1.text: Because the only time you even think about it is when you come here to drink!

bar_group_line2.speaker: Thea
bar_group_line2.text: Calm down, Oran. Florence and I miss him too, you know that. It's in the past now. We can't protect him anymore.

bar_group_oran.speaker: Oran
bar_group_oran.text: Oh, because Florence has always protected him before.

bar_group_oran2.speaker: Oran
bar_group_oran2.text: No! Just because you refuse to tell Thea anything–

bar_group_florence_hello.speaker: Florence
bar_group_florence_hello.text: ...Hello. Don't worry about interrupting, we were just finishing up our conversation anyways. I don't think I've seen you around before. My name is Florence.

bar_group_florence_pleasure.speaker: Florence
bar_group_florence_pleasure.text: Its a pleasure to meet you, too. I hope we have the chance to meet again in the future. Unfortunately, it's about time I head in for the night.

bar_group_thea.speaker: Thea
bar_group_thea.text: Um.. sorry about that. I'm Thea, and that was Oran. We were just.. Um.. thinking. About an old friend of ours.

bar_group_inez_end.speaker: Inez
bar_group_inez_end.text: Ah.. we probably shouldn't bother her anymore..

florence_repeat.speaker: Thea
florence_repeat.text: Um.. it was nice to meet you earlier. Sorry again about all that.

florence_day2_city2.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_city2.text: Hello there. My name is Florence. It's my pleasure to meet you.

florence_day2_dont_remember.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_dont_remember.text: ..we have? My apologies, but I'm afraid I don't remember…

florence_day2_dont_remember2.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_dont_remember2.text: I don't think I've seen you around town before, I-

florence_day2_bar_recall.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_bar_recall.text: Ah… you were at the bar last night?

florence_day2_strange_look.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_strange_look.text: Forgive me for saying so, but you're giving me quite a strange look. Do I have something on my face..?

florence_day2_met_before.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_met_before.text: Or.. have we actually met before?

florence_day2_player_confirm.speaker: Player
florence_day2_player_confirm.text: ...yeah, I saw you at the bar last night.

florence_day2_apology.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_apology.text: I am truly sorry for not properly introducing myself then. I.. was a little out of it.

choices.text: No worries, it happens to the best of us.

florence_day2_argument.speaker: Player
florence_day2_argument.text: ...that seemed like a pretty bad argument. Did you make up with your friends?

florence_day2_acquaintances.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_acquaintances.text: I apologize for any confusion. Those two aren't my friends. We are simply old acquaintances.

florence_day2_busy.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_busy.text: Well, if you'll excuse me, I actually am quite busy.

florence_day2_pleasure.speaker: Florence
florence_day2_pleasure.text: It was a pleasure meeting you.

bar_day2.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2.text: Oh, hi! It's nice to see you again, [NAME].

bar_day2_oran_bar.speaker: Oran
bar_day2_oran_bar.text: I don't think seeing me from across the bar counts as meeting.

bar_day2_aiden_intro.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_aiden_intro.text: ...right. Well, this is Oran. He's a good friend of mine. And Oran, this is [NAME]. They're new in town.

bar_day2_aiden_question.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_aiden_question.text: So what brings you to the bar today?

bar_day2_about_florence.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_about_florence.text: Oh, you've met them? They're a bit of an enigma.

bar_day2_florence_info.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_florence_info.text: They just showed up one day, and they already knew the town like the back of their hand. I had never seen them before, though.

bar_day2_florence_timing.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_florence_timing.text: Oh! And they got here around the same time Oran and Thea did, but I never see them talking to them.

bar_day2_oran_irritable.speaker: Oran
bar_day2_oran_irritable.text: You would be too if some stranger kept poking their nose in your business.

bar_day2_about_oran.speaker: Oran
bar_day2_about_oran.text: Don't ask him about me. I'm right here!

bar_day2_oran_aiden_response.speaker: Aiden
bar_day2_oran_aiden_response.text: ...that's one way of putting it. ...as you can see, Oran is a bit.. irritable.

bar_day3_player_thoughts.speaker: Player
bar_day3_player_thoughts.text: ...How much have they had to drink?

bar_day3_repeat.speaker: Player
bar_day3_repeat.text: They're too drunk to notice me...

bar_day4_2.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_2.text: I hope everything is going well.

bar_day4_thea2.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_thea2.text: She arrived out of the blue one day just like Florence and Oran…

bar_day4_thea3.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_thea3.text: Now that I think about it, she got here about the same time as them, too.

bar_day4_thea4.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_thea4.text: She spends a lot of time on her own.. She's a bit spacey.

bar_day4_rupin2.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_rupin2.text: I know everyone who comes through this town, but…

bar_day4_rupin3.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_rupin3.text: I've never even heard of someone called Rupin before.

bar_day4_poppy2.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_poppy2.text: He's a strange one, that's for sure.

bar_day4_poppy3.speaker: Aiden
bar_day4_poppy3.text: Honestly, I can't tell if he actually believes all the nonsense he says or if he's doing it for a joke at this point. Some of what he says is just too ridiculous for anyone to believe, even him.
